Schedule a Discussion

30-minute introductory call with the NBF Connect team

What to expect in this call

  • Understand your hiring or volunteering requirement
  • We explain how Shurveer matching works
  • Next steps and timeline discussed
1. Who Are You?
Full Name is required
Designation is required
Organisation Name is required
Please select an industry
Enter a valid email address
Enter a valid 10-digit phone number
2. What Do You Need?
Please select a purpose
Please select requirement size
Please select a timeline
Please select at least one type
0 / 200
Brief requirement is required
3. When Can We Talk?
Weekdays only (Monâ€“Fri)
Select a valid weekday within 14 days
Please select a time slot
Alternate time cannot match preferred time
Please select a meeting mode

Discussion request received!

You'll get a confirmation email within 2 hours with meeting link or call details.

Newsletter

NBF = National Bharat Force — India's disciplined youth force comprising NCC, NSS, Scouts & Guides, NYKS and Civil Defence members.
